subcodes.first_line: Several most holy and most exalted Tablets, specifically destined for the Afnán who dwell in that land, have been graciously bestowed. God willing, they shall attain unto them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چند لوح امنع اقدس مخصوص افنان موجوده در آن ارض عنایت شد انشآءالله بآن فائز شوند
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation
